title: How Gartner (IT) Stock Stands Out in a Strong Industry
text: Gartner (IT) has seen solid earnings estimate revision activity over the past month, and belongs to a strong industry as well.

title: Gartner (IT) is a Great Momentum Stock: Should You Buy?
text: Does Gartner (IT) have what it takes to be a top stock pick for momentum investors? Let's find out.

title: Gartner (IT) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, 2022 EPS Guidance Up
text: Gartner's (IT) third-quarter 2022 earnings and revenues rise year over year.

title: Gartner, Inc. (IT) CEO Gene Hall on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 1, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Gene Hall - CEO Craig Safian - CFO Conference Call Participants Jeff Meuler - Baird Toni Kaplan - Morgan Stanley Andrew Nicholas - William Blair Seth Weber - Wells Fargo George Tong - Goldman Sachs Jeff Silber - BMO Capital Markets Manav Patnaik - Barclays Stephanie Moore - Jefferies Operator Good morning everyone. Welcome to Gartner's Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Call.

title: Gartner (IT) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Gartner (IT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 30.27% and 4.68%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
